name: Beef Ricotta Meatballs with Leftover Veggies and Pasta Salad
notes: Monday dinner. No extra pasta needed because pasta salad is already the side.
instructions: Heat oven to 400F and line a sheet pan.
Mix beef, ricotta, egg, crushed crackers, Italian seasoning, garlic powder, salt, and pepper just until combined.
Roll small meatballs and bake 15 to 18 minutes until cooked through.
Warm leftover vegetables while the meatballs cook.
Serve with leftover vegetables and pasta salad. Add tomato sauce only if wanted.
